_meta.description: Monster parts and salvage drops for Canon Engine RPG economy
_meta.note: Parts drop from specific enemy types and are used in crafting/alchemy/selling

monster_parts.name: Goblin Ear
monster_parts.description: A severed goblin ear. Some bounty boards accept these as proof.

monster_parts.name: Wolf Pelt
monster_parts.description: A thick grey pelt. Can be sold or used in tailoring.

monster_parts.name: Wolf Fang
monster_parts.description: A sharp canine tooth. Used in some alchemy recipes.

monster_parts.name: Bone Fragment
monster_parts.description: A fragment of animated bone. Still faintly magical.

monster_parts.name: Ectoplasm
monster_parts.description: A translucent, gooey substance that glows faintly with necrotic energy.

monster_parts.name: Bandit Insignia
monster_parts.description: A rough metal badge or token identifying a bandit gang.

monster_parts.name: Spider Silk
monster_parts.description: Incredibly strong and fine spider silk. Valued by tailors and alchemists.

monster_parts.name: Spider Venom Sac
monster_parts.description: A delicate sac filled with potent venom. Handle with extreme care.

monster_parts.name: Shadow-Touched Cloak
monster_parts.description: A cloak that seems to absorb light. Still warm with residual magic.

monster_parts.name: Shadow Crystal
monster_parts.description: A crystallized fragment of shadow energy. Pulses with dark power.

monster_parts.name: Military Dog Tag
monster_parts.description: A rusted identification tag. The name is barely legible.

monster_parts.name: Rusty Sword
monster_parts.description: A corroded blade. Can be smelted down for iron.

monster_parts.name: Crypt Lord's Soul Shard
monster_parts.description: A fragment of Malachar's bound soul energy. Radiates cold.

monster_parts.name: Shadow King's Essence
monster_parts.description: Raw essence of the Shadow Realm itself, left behind when Valdris fell.
